action.reasoning: Observation: the last resubmission of the current best family did not improve; best hidden-test remains 0.011613 from checkpoints/gauss_rank_lgb_sweep_v2. Analysis: repeated validation-based tuning is now likely overfitting 2021. With ample time but finite iterations, the highest expected value is to preserve the best checkpoint and avoid destabilizing code. A prudent move is to submit the exact best checkpoint again as the final candidate, since predict.py has already been sanity-checked locally on it. Decision: submit checkpoints/gauss_rank_lgb_sweep_v2 with the existing predict.py and stop unless a later eval is needed.
